hero.headline: Build structure. Create momentum.
hero.subhead: Flow Guide helps you grow through calm learning paths, daily accountability, and practical systems that turn small actions into lasting change.
hero.trustStrip: Private & secure · Cancel anytime · Guided daily structure

home.featuredTitle: Choose the life you want to practice.
home.featuredBody: Every course blends reflection, structure, and action so learning becomes part of your daily rhythm.

design.title: Design your ideal lifestyle
design.body: Clarify the routines, spaces, and choices that support the person you are becoming.

mindset.title: Mindset and habits mastery
mindset.body: Build the identity, discipline, and momentum that make consistency feel natural.

glow.title: Glow Flow foundations
glow.body: Follow a calm system for deep work, weekly review, attention hygiene, and real progress.

home.howTitle: A calmer way to grow, one clear step at a time.
home.howBody: The system gives your ambition a shape: choose a path, practice daily, and keep visible proof that you are becoming more focused, disciplined, and intentional.

journey.step1Body: Start with a path that matches the area of life you want to strengthen first.
journey.step2Body: Short lessons and focused actions help you turn insight into behavior.
journey.step3Body: Completion, streaks, and reflection make your progress feel tangible.

home.pillarsIntro: Learn with clarity and consistency through tools that make momentum easy to see—and easier to repeat.

paths.title: Guided learning paths
paths.body: A clear sequence turns big life goals into approachable lessons, reflections, and daily practice.

accountability.title: Accountability and momentum
accountability.body: Progress stays visible so each small action reinforces the next one.

coach.title: AI coaching support
coach.body: Reflect, reset, and choose the next best step with calm guidance when focus starts to drift.

systems.title: Calm structured systems
systems.body: Simple rituals help you protect attention, organize priorities, and keep growth sustainable.

home.coachTitle: Reflect, reset, and return to what matters.
home.coachBody: When the day gets noisy, your coach helps you name the obstacle, simplify the next action, and protect the life you're building.
home.coachPromptBody: What is the smallest focused action that would make tonight feel like progress?
home.ctaBandTitle: Small daily actions become real change when your path is clear.
home.ctaBandBody: Start with one guided path and build the rhythm that helps your learning show up in everyday life.
home.trustBuiltBody: Flow Guide was designed to help people grow without burnout, pressure, or hustle culture. Small focused actions, calm structure, and visible progress create momentum that lasts.

publicCourses.title: Explore the paths
publicCourses.intro: Discover guided routes designed to fit your day and hold your focus gently.
publicCourses.note: Full courses and saved progress live in your dashboard once you're signed in.

pricing.metaDescription: Choose a plan that fits your rhythm. Guided paths, saved progress, and structure to turn learning into real-life change.
pricing.title: Invest in a calmer way to grow.
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your rhythm. Every membership includes guided paths, saved progress, and the structure to turn learning into real-life change.
pricing.trialNote: Cancel anytime during trial or from your account.
pricing.plansTitle: Start with focus. Upgrade when you want more support.
pricing.alreadyBody: Sign in to pick up where you left off, or create an account to begin your trial.
pricing.cardBaseDesc: Everything you need for steady progress on your own timeline.
pricing.cardPlusDesc: Extra guidance for people who want momentum from day one.

features.base1: Full access to guided learning paths
features.plus3: Early access to AI coaching experiences

pricing.checkoutPrep: Membership checkout is being prepared. Please check back shortly.

legal.termsLead: This is placeholder copy. Replace with your final legal terms.
legal.privacyLead: This is placeholder copy. Describe how you handle personal data.

errors.notFoundBody: The link may be outdated or the page may no longer exist.

seo.defaultDescription: Premium guided learning paths for structure, momentum, and personal growth.

layout.upgradeBody: Go premium for full courses, quests, and members-only features.

shared.courseFallbackDescription: Browse published programs and open your roadmap.
shared.syllabusNote: Syllabus order — playback unlocks with membership.
shared.minPerLessonNote: Estimates use ~{minutes} min per lesson until each lesson has a real duration.

home.welcomeBody: Small steps today add up to real momentum. Your path, progress, and next lesson are ready when you are.
home.streakCue: Daily streak not wired yet—shown as a coaching cue.
home.levelDerived: Derived from completion %—not stored server-side yet.
home.membershipUnlocks: Membership unlocks lessons and synced progress.
home.pathComplete: Path complete — revisit any lesson anytime.
home.membershipFootnote: Lesson viewer and progress sync are included with membership — use View plans above.
home.pathProgressDesc: Lessons completed on your primary course
home.enrollForProgress: Enroll in a course to see progress here.
home.focusModuleActive: Progress inside the module you’re in
home.focusModuleLocked: Unlock lessons to track module quests
home.moduleQuestHint: Complete this module to unlock the next milestone.
home.focusCaughtUp: You’re caught up or no module context — open the roadmap.
home.focusSubscribe: Subscribe to continue your quest path.
home.milestoneEmpty: Finish every lesson in a module to earn a milestone badge here.
home.activityEmpty: No activity yet. Sign-ins, account changes, and team events will appear here.

courses.title: Course library
courses.subtitle: Structured courses with guided lessons, saved progress, and a clear path so you can keep learning steadily.

activity.subtitleQuests: Lesson-based quests from your primary course
activity.subtitleAchievements: Milestones earned from your learning path
activity.logDesc: Account and workspace events (sign-in, team changes, and more).
activity.noActivityBody: When you sign in, update your account, or change your workspace, it will show up here.
activity.moduleQuestsDesc: Each module is a quest: finish its lessons to complete it. Progress follows your course checklist.
activity.achievementsDesc: Milestones unlock as you move ({completed}/{total} lessons · {percent}% overall). {unlocked}/{totalBadges} badges earned.
activity.emptyQuestsBody: Start a course to see module quests based on your lesson progress.
activity.emptyAchievementsBody: Start a course to see milestones based on your lesson progress.
activity.masteredDesc: Completed every lesson in this module.

finisher.title: Finisher
finisher.description: Complete every lesson in the course.

branching-paths.title: Branching paths
branching-paths.description: Have active progress in at least two modules.

full-map.title: Full map
full-map.description: Complete at least one lesson in every module.

half-the-hall.title: Half the hall
half-the-hall.description: Fully complete at least half of all modules.

quests.campaignDesc: Each module is a major quest. Finish its lessons to complete it—progress stays synced with your checklist.
quests.sideDesc: One quest per lesson—complete the lesson to check it off. Spotlight quests include bonus badges.

coachSnapshot.milestone25: A quarter of your path explored
coachSnapshot.milestone75: Three quarters of the journey done
coachSnapshot.milestone100: Your whole course, lesson by lesson

coach.welcomeIntro: Hi {name}—this space reflects what you’ve actually done in your lessons. Nothing is rushed; it’s meant to feel like a steady hand beside you.
coach.madeForJourney: Made for your journey · richer conversations ahead
coach.howCoachSpeaks: How your coach speaks to you
coach.streakLessonDays: Days in a row with a finished lesson
coach.remindersExplainer: Here when you open this page—not as push alerts
coach.remindersCaughtUp: You’re caught up on scripted reminders. Keep flowing.
coach.chooseCourseLibrary: Choose a course in your library to begin.
coach.growthPointsBody: Includes {bonus} bonus points from modules you’ve fully completed—something to celebrate, not a scoreboard exam.
coach.dailyRhythmBody: Days in a row you’ve completed at least one lesson—small consistency, quietly powerful.
coach.whereYouStandBody: A simple lens on how far you’ve traveled—meant to encourage, not pressure.
coach.feedEmpty: Finish a lesson and this space fills with encouragement tailored to your pace.
coach.patternsTitle: Patterns that help you see yourself clearly
coach.chartCaption: A simple visual—meant to feel your pace, not crunch numbers.
coach.prioritiesTitle: What deserves your next ounce of attention
coach.prioritiesEmpty: Complete another lesson and we’ll highlight the next meaningful focus.
coach.journalSubtitle: Private notes that stay with you
coach.attentionCardSubtitle: Suggestions drawn from your journey—steady, human, and easy to trust.
coach.footerAheadBody: Deeper coaching narratives and optional cloud sync may arrive later—always built around your real progress. For now, everything you see grows from the lessons you've lived.

weekly.privacyCalm: Your intentions stay on this device—there’s no scoreboard, only support.
weekly.privacyMotivational: You choose the bar—we cheer beside it.
weekly.privacyStrategic: Tune targets anytime—the week is yours to design.
weekly.privacyDirect: Saved privately in your browser for now.
weekly.nameWeekTitle: Name what this week means to you
weekly.emptyTargetsHint: Add a lesson, minute, or module goal to see your week come alive. When Monday arrives, we quietly begin again—your intention can travel with you.
weekly.streakLessonsLine: Days in a row you've finished a lesson:
weekly.streakVisitsLine: Days you've opened this coaching space:

journal.hintCalm: Stillness is okay—when you’re ready, one honest line is enough.
journal.hintMotivational: Fresh page, fresh energy—note a win from today.
journal.hintStrategic: Start with one takeaway worth remembering.
journal.digestTitle: A quiet place to digest what you're learning
journal.privateNote: Your reflections stay private on this device for now.
journal.placeholderChallenged: What slowed you down or surprised you?
journal.placeholderApply: Tiny next step beats a big vague plan.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage invoices, payment methods, and plan changes.
